prerequisites: A running Dremio software (self-managed) deployment whose REST API is reachable over the network.
The base URL of your Dremio coordinator (the base_url config field), used as the {hostname} for /api/v3 requests.
A Dremio token to place in the api_key secret field: either a personal access token (PAT) or a token obtained from the login endpoint.
To use personal access tokens, an administrator must enable them via the auth.personal-access-tokens.enabled support key so the option appears in account settings.

authMethods.name: Token in Authorization header (api_key)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single api_key secret, which is a Dremio access token. Dremio accepts the token in the Authorization HTTP header using either the standard Bearer format (Authorization: Bearer <token>) or the self-contained _dremio<token> format. The token can be a personal access token created in the Dremio console or a token returned by Dremio's login endpoint.

setupSteps.title: Record your Dremio base URL
setupSteps.body: Identify the hostname of your Dremio coordinator. Dremio REST requests are made against {hostname}/api/v3. Enter that hostname as the base_url config field.

setupSteps.title: Enable personal access tokens (admin)
setupSteps.body: If you plan to use a personal access token, have a Dremio administrator enable the auth.personal-access-tokens.enabled support key. Without it, the Personal Access Tokens option does not appear in account settings.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal access token
setupSteps.body: In Dremio, click your user icon and select Account Settings, choose Personal Access Tokens from the sidebar, click Generate Token, enter a label, set the lifetime (1 to 180 days), then click Generate. Copy the token immediately because it is shown only once.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token as api_key
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated token (or a token obtained from Dremio's login endpoint) into the api_key secret field. The connector sends it in the Authorization header against the {base_url}/api/v3 endpoints.

sources.title: Dremio API Reference (authentication and base URL)
